7月1日起，克里斯蒂安·斯坦（Christian Stein）将接替何塞·马雷亚·里卡森（Josep María Recasens）, 出任雷诺集团西班牙新任首席执行官。何塞·马雷亚·里卡森将离开雷诺集团，寻求新的职业发展。克里斯蒂安·斯坦将在担任该新职务的同时，继续兼任雷诺集团首席传播官，并向雷诺集团首席执行官福兰（François Provost）汇报。

chinese_news.title: ChinaJoy最硬核的区域，36氪与你共同探索 | Vision Future前沿科技展区 × 36氪直播间开启预约
chinese_news.summary:
两个月后，ChinaJoy即将在上海浦东举办，这里又会挤满全国最爱玩、最关注前沿科技的年轻人。

作为国内延续二十年的数字娱乐展会，ChinaJoy早已不只是玩家试玩新游戏的狂欢，它已经变成整个科技+数字娱乐行业一年一度的线下交汇点——这里有最新的产品、最先锋的趋势，更聚集了一群想改变行业的年轻人和创业者，在这里你能摸到这个行业最真实的脉搏。

作为ChinaJoy Vision Future 前沿科技展区的战略合作伙伴，以及ChinaJoy AI未来生态大会的战略合作伙伴，36氪游戏与ChinaJoy 联合打造「ChinaJoy Vision Future 前沿科技展区 × 36氪直播间」，将一线报道的质感和信息密度直接带给观众。

过去三年，科技对数字娱乐的改造速度超过了所有人的预期，AI从实验室概念变成了行业标配的生产工具，具身智能、新一代消费电子不断打开新的想象空间，整个赛道每天都有新公司、新产品、新模式冒出来，很多变化都发生在一线，只看线上通稿你根本摸不到

chinese_news.title: 最前线｜坦途科技全球首款消费级水上飞行器首飞，拓展水陆空场景出行生态
chinese_news.summary:
文｜张子怡

编辑｜袁斯来

近期，智能户外出行品牌坦途科技在苏州发布了全球首款消费级载人水上飞行器WaveFly 5X，并完成首次公开飞行。随着该产品的亮相，坦途科技的硬件布局正式从陆地短交通延伸至水域与低空出行领域。

这一新品类的推出，切中低空经济在消费端的产品空白。据摩根士丹利的预测，全球低空经济市场规模将在2030年突破2万亿美元，其中水域飞行是一个具备消费潜力的细分场景，但此前市场上缺乏面向普通消费者的量产产品。

坦途科技此次选择的“地效贴水飞行”形态，旨在通过技术手段降低个人飞行的准入和操作门槛。

在产品设计上，WaveFly 5X采用双串翼式布局与航空级碳纤维机身。由于其基于地效原理运行，飞行高度保持在距水面30至80厘米的低空，能够直接在开阔水面起降，无需专用跑道、机场和繁琐的飞行审批。在性能参数方面，该飞行器最高时速为85公里，最大载重140公斤，续航里程达80公里。机身搭载模块化快换电池，单次续航最长为70分钟。

对于非专业用户而言，WaveFly 5X的核

chinese_news.title: 48元的良心日游，揭露了国产单机的最大困境 | 游戏风向标
chinese_news.summary:
文丨贝果树

编辑丨果脯

5月9日，日本独立游戏发行商MAGI发帖，表示《梦幻魔法公主》“受到了远远超出想象的热烈支持”。

彼时，这款游戏刚发售12天，销量超过了20万份。

或许对于销量动辄百万的大作来说，20万不是个值得一提的数字。但对于一款日本独立游戏来说，这确实是个不少的数量。开发商之一Neotro在22年发售的独立射击游戏《NeverAwake》在Steam平台上，甚至只有一百多的评论数。但如今，借着20万份的热度，《梦幻魔法公主》在游戏发售后甚至发起了众筹计划，打算向玩家贩售游戏周边。

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 创维独家投资数千万，这家企业将碳化硅切割损耗降至40微米内
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，高端工业激光装备制造商——中微精仪科技（深圳）有限公司（下称“中微精仪”）近期已完成数千万元天使+轮融资，由创维投资独家投资。资金将主要用于市场拓展、产能提升及新产品开发。

中微精仪成立于2024年11月，专注于碳化硅晶锭激光剥离、金刚石激光剥离、水导激光精密加工等高端工业激光装备的研发与制造。公司创始人陈景煜为澳大利亚新南威尔士大学研究员，长期从事特种芯片集成开发；首席科学家孙洪波则为中国科学院院士、清华大学教授，是非线性激光超精密制造领域的先驱。

与市面上多数激光设备公司不同，中微精仪定位为激光精密加工技术平台，覆盖从机理研究、工艺开发到工程化落地的全链条。其设备已在碳化硅衬底切割、金刚石加工等领域进入头部客户量产验证阶段。

公司当前的核心业务聚焦两大方向：

一是碳化硅衬底激光分片设备。中微精仪自研的脉冲可编程与裂纹定向诱导生长技术，已能将分片损耗稳定控制在40微米以内，远低于行业常见的80-120微米水平。

当前，

2026世界杯门票遇冷，近18万张门票待转售

北京时间6月12日，2026年美加墨世界杯将举行揭幕战。目前，国际足联（FIFA）官方转售平台上挂牌出售的门票达17.6万张，主要集中在小组赛阶段。根据FIFA平台数据所做的价格与库存统计，不同球队之间的人气差异十分明显。例如，在伊朗队参加的3场小组赛中，仍有约1.6万张门票尚未售出，市场上最便宜的普通座位售价为138美元（约合934元人民币）。过去一个月，官方转售平台上的门票中位价已累计下跌20%。媒体测算显示，考虑到平台对转售交易收取26%的手续费，大多数转售卖家如今可能已处

chinese_news.title: 雅典表发布2026新品系列，180周年之际加码机械创新与艺术合作｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
2026年6月，上海敬华艺术空间被布置成一间“奇想实验室”。瑞士高级制表品牌Ulysse Nardin雅典表在此举办“奇想无界，创造无境”2026新品品鉴会，将全新[Super] Freak奇想超级腕表、与中国当代艺术家刘人岛合作的鎏金系列《名扬四海》联名腕表，以及多枚代表性时计一并陈列。

对这家1846年诞生于瑞士勒洛克的独立制表商而言，这是一个被精心挑选的时间点——品牌创立180周年，恰逢其标志性的FREAK奇想系列问世25周年。

在全球奢侈品消费整体承压、中国高端钟表市场进入结构性调整的当下，一个拥有180年历史的瑞士品牌，为何把重要的周年节点放在上海，又为何选择与一位以国画见长的中国艺术家联名？答案藏在产品结构与叙事策略的双线之中。

从商业结构看，这场品鉴会呈现的是一组“金字塔”式的产品组合。塔尖是作为周年献礼的[Super] Freak奇想超级腕表。据品牌介绍，新作历时四年研制，是世界上首款融合双陀飞轮与卡罗素结构的自动上链腕表，搭载自制UN-252机芯，由511个零件构成，融合8项专利技术，限量发行50枚，被雅典表

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin exceed $70,000 by end of Q3 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC at $63.2K amid Iran geopolitical escalation and gold weakness suggest flight-to-crypto dynamics; SpaceX IPO liquidity influx and tokenization momentum (Canton, Citi onchain) are tailwinds.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Bitcoin tags $63.2K), CoinDesk (Canton $355M, Citi tokenized offering), CNBC (SpaceX IPO absorption concern)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will OpenAI's GPT product pricing drop by 25%+ within 12 months?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: 36Kr reports OpenAI considering major price cuts; Ona acquisition signals move into longer-running, more compute-intensive tasks—suggests margin compression.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: 36Kr (OpenAI price cut consideration), CNBC (OpenAI-Ona acquisition announcement)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Iran close the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping for >7 consecutive days by Sept 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Iran declared all ships blocked in Hormuz; Trump threatens Kharg Island seizure; escalation tempo accelerating with second day of US-Iran strikes.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Trump seize Iran oil infrastructure, Iran retaliates), BBC (US-Iran exchange strikes second day, Hormuz closure announced)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVDA close above $140 on any day in May 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Tokenization boom (Wall Street onchain $355M raise, Citi, Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas initiatives) and SpaceX IPO demand suggest sustained semiconductor tailwinds; Oracle's capex concerns highlight contrast.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Canton Network $355M, Citi onchain, tokenization momentum), CNBC (Oracle capex, SpaceX IPO absorption capacity)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will gold price fall below $2,000/oz by end of Q2 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Gold at 6-month low despite inflation fears; 36Kr reports Citi warns gold could hit $3,500 (typo likely—should be USD range); technical breakdown and rate-hike expectations override safe-haven demand.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Gold slumps to 6-month low, inflation fears rise), 36Kr (Citi warning on gold price)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Strait of Hormuz remain fully open to commercial tanker traffic through June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: NOAA Shipping News, Lloyd's List, or official US State Dept statement confirming no blockade
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Market likely assigns <30% probability to full closure given diplomatic precedent, but Iran's formal declaration and Trump's escalation rhetoric push real risk higher.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Iran's announced Hormuz closure + Trump seize Kharg Island threat + second consecutive day of US-Iran strikes

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Elon Musk announce operational shutdown or divestment of any major business unit in Middle East by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official SEC filing (10-Q/8-K for Tesla/SpaceX equivalent), press release from Musk, or reporting from CNBC/Reuters/Bloomberg with company confirmation
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Iran explicitly designated Musk companies as military targets; market may underestimate reputational/operational risk or assume state-level protection.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Iran threatens Musk companies in Middle East, escalating US-Iran strikes

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OpenAI's per-token or per-query pricing for GPT models decrease by ≥20% in aggregate by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: OpenAI official pricing page, SEC filing (if OpenAI goes public), or audited press release
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr exclusive suggests price cuts are under active consideration; market may lag internal strategic shifts; competition from Claude, DeepSeek amplifies pressure.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr reports OpenAI considering major price cuts; Ona acquisition indicates long-task efficiency play

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the total market cap of US-listed tokenization-focused fintech ETFs (e.g., blockchain infrastructure, RWA) exceed $5 billion by October 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Bloomberg, Morningstar, or official fund custodian AUM data
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Canton Network, Citi, Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas all deploying capital into onchain infrastructure; retail crypto adoption accelerating; markets may price as niche until ETFs launch.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Canton $355M raise, Citi onchain offering, BNP/Franklin Templeton capital efficiency thesis, MassPay-Coinbase stablecoin expansion

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's 7-day realized volatility remain below 3% for any 5 consecutive days in May 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko, Messari, or Glassnode 7-day realized volatility metric
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Geopolitical escalation (Iran, Trump) typically drives crypto volatility up, not down; low conviction in sustained calm, but market may price in 'meme coin cycle' distraction.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BTC at $63.2K ignoring Iran, Hormuz, inflation—suggests market desensitization or consolidation phase

investment_theses.thesis: Long uranium/nuclear plays and short gold ETFs on view that Iran escalation + inflation fears redirect safe-haven flows to energy security vs. commodities.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump threatens Kharg Island seizure; Iran declares Hormuz closure → crude supply risk premium ↑
CNBC: Gold at 6-month lows despite inflation fears → technical breakdown signals speculative liquidation, not hedging demand
36Kr: Citi warns gold could fall further; rate-hike expectations override safe-haven bid
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical shock historically flight-to-safety into gold; uranium illiquid relative to commodities, and energy supply shocks crimp nuclear demand.
investment_theses.expression: Long URA (uranium ETF) or CCJ (Cameco); Short GLD (gold ETF) via put spread or synthetic short; hedge with USO (crude) calls

investment_theses.thesis: Long Solana (SOL) and onchain infrastructure tokens on conviction that Wall Street tokenization boom (Canton, Citi, Franklin Templeton) drives L1 competition and SpaceX IPO liquidity influx boosts retail FOMO.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Canton Network $355M raise, Citi onchain offering, Franklin Templeton/BNP tokenization thesis
CoinDesk: SpaceX stock going live on Solana same day as Nasdaq → symbolic validator of SOL ecosystem maturity
Crypto trending: HYPE, H, BONK, PENGU suggest retail alt-L1/memecoin activity; Velvet, Beat indexing sentiment
investment_theses.counter_view: Tokenization hype historically front-run by institutions; retail FOMO peaks before mass adoption; regulatory overhang on stablecoins (MassPay-Coinbase moves likely cautious).
investment_theses.expression: SOL spot or SOL/BTC ratio; SOL 3-month call spreads; or basket of SOL + UNI + PENGU on Solana momentum

investment_theses.thesis: Short Oracle (ORCL) and tech capex plays; long software-as-a-service (SaaS) on view that negative FCF and capital raises signal sector rotation away from hardware/infrastructure into efficient AI tools.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Oracle beats earnings but tumbles 11% on negative FCF and capital raise → market reprices capex burden
CNBC: OpenAI cutting prices (36Kr) suggests margin compression in inference; Ona acquisition = efficiency play
CoinDesk: onchain infrastructure $355M raise (Canton) signals capital reallocation to fintech rails, not legacy enterprise DB
investment_theses.counter_view: Oracle capex justified by cloud growth and AI GPU demand; FCF swing temporary; capital raise de-risks; traditional enterprise still pays premium for license lock-in.
investment_theses.expression: Short ORCL vs. long CRM (Salesforce) or NET (Cloudflare) tech-agnostic SaaS; or ORCL put calendar spread

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY (US Dollar Index) on view that Iran escalation, Hormuz risk, and US military posture under Trump drive safe-haven bid and commodity volatility → EM FX pressure.
supporting_signals: BBC/CNBC: US-Iran strikes escalating; Trump threatens resource seizure → geopolitical premium on USD liquidity
CNBC: Gold weakness despite inflation → real rates (USD carry) outbid inflation hedge
36Kr: South Africa-Nigeria migration tensions, Sudan drone strikes → broader EM instability themes
investment_theses.counter_view: Escalation could force Fed rate cuts (flight-to-safety → liquidity dump); commodity shock inflation could weigh DXY on expectations of policy easing.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY spot ETF (UUP) or DXY 3-month call; or short emerging-market FX basket (EEM) vs. long DXY hedge

investment_theses.thesis: Long 2026 US election advertising spend proxies (media stocks, programmatic ad platforms) on conviction that record midterm spend ($36Kr mention of record high) and Trump political capital = sustained ad-market tailwinds.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 2026 advertising spend expected to reach record high, outpacing presidential years (California, Texas key races)
Political economy: Trump sticky approval + high-profile midterms → PAC funding sustained; digital/crypto ad budgets likely beneficiaries
investment_theses.counter_view: Ad spend concentrates in Q3–Q4 2026; early-year weakness; fragmentation to TikTok/blockchain-native platforms cannibalizes legacy media.
investment_theses.expression: Long programmatic ad ETF (e.g., IAT if available) or direct longs: RKLM (Reklam), ROKU, or DIS (via advertising segment bet)
